'''Delgas Medical''', also known as '''Delgas Corporation''', was a medical supplies manufactured located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kabaira]]. It manufactured and sold medical equipment and medicines. [[Del Hunter]] worked for Delgas as a sales representative.<ref name="P" /> The [[Delgas Medical Supplies]] facility on [[Sel Zonn Station]] was headed by Dr. [[Byra Fenn]].<ref name="Gambit">{{DoD|The Traitor's Gambit}}</ref>
